user.title: Connect to LLM API
user.description: Set up your configurable LLM API connection. Works with Anthropic-compatible APIs including the official API, z.ai, and other compatible services.

data_description.api_key: Enter your API key for the LLM service.
data_description.base_url: Enter the base URL for your LLM API endpoint. Default is Anthropic's official API. Use z.ai or other compatible services by entering their base URL.

error.authentication_error: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API. Please check your base URL and network connection.
error.timeout_connect: Connection timeout. The API took too long to respond.
error.invalid_url_format: Invalid API endpoint format. Check that the base URL is correct and ends with / (e.g., https://api.z.ai/v1/)
error.entry_not_loaded: The integration entry is not loaded. Please reload the integration and try again.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

error.thinking_budget_too_large: Thinking budget must be less than the Maximum tokens.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

error.thinking_budget_too_large: Thinking budget must be less than the Maximum tokens.

data_description.llm_hass_api: Allow the LLM to control Home Assistant.
data_description.name: The name of this configuration
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.

data_description.chat_model: The model to serve the responses.
data_description.prompt_caching: Optimize your API cost and response times based on your usage.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.code_execution: Allow the model to execute code in a secure sandbox environment, enabling it to analyze data and perform complex calculations.
data_description.max_tokens: Limit the number of response tokens.
data_description.thinking_budget: The number of tokens the model can use to think about the response out of the total maximum number of tokens. Set to 1024 or greater to enable extended thinking.
data_description.thinking_effort: Control how many tokens Claude uses when responding, trading off between response thoroughness and token efficiency
data_description.tool_search: Enable dynamic tool discovery instead of preloading all tools into the context
data_description.web_search: The web search tool gives Claude direct access to real-time web content, allowing it to answer questions with up-to-date information beyond its knowledge cutoff
data_description.web_search_max_uses: Limit the number of searches performed per response
data_description.web_search_user_location: Localize search results based on home location
